# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that builds Docker images with user-provided image tags and registry URLs. Accept these as build parameters and use them directly in docker build and push commands. This allows teams to deploy to different registries without modifying the pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(
            name: 'IMAGE_NAME',
            defaultValue: 'my-application',
            description: 'Name of the Docker image to build'
        )
        string(
            name: 'IMAGE_TAG',
            defaultValue: 'latest',
            description: 'Tag for the Docker image (e.g., latest, v1.0.0, dev)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'REGISTRY_URL',
            defaultValue: 'docker.io',
            description: 'Docker registry URL (e.g., docker.io, gcr.io/my-project, 123456789.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'REGISTRY_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: 'docker-registry-credentials',
            description: 'Jenkins credentials ID for the Docker registry authentication'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DOCKERFILE_PATH',
            defaultValue: '.',
            description: 'Path to the Dockerfile context directory'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DOCKERFILE_NAME',
            defaultValue: 'Dockerfile',
            description: 'Name of the Dockerfile to use'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'PUSH_IMAGE',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Push the built image to the registry'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'USE_BUILD_CACHE',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Use Docker build cache'
        )
        string(
            name: 'BUILD_ARGS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Additional Docker build arguments (e.g., --build-arg ENV=prod --build-arg VERSION=1.0)'
        )
    }

    environment {
        FULL_IMAGE_NAME = "${params.REGISTRY_URL}/${params.IMAGE_NAME}:${params.IMAGE_TAG}"
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "============================================"
                    echo "Build Configuration:"
                    echo "============================================"
                    echo "Image Name:    ${params.IMAGE_NAME}"
                    echo "Image Tag:     ${params.IMAGE_TAG}"
                    echo "Registry URL:  ${params.REGISTRY_URL}"
                    echo "Full Image:    ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"
                    echo "Dockerfile:    ${params.DOCKERFILE_PATH}/${params.DOCKERFILE_NAME}"
                    echo "Push Image:    ${params.PUSH_IMAGE}"
                    echo "Use Cache:     ${params.USE_BUILD_CACHE}"
                    echo "Build Args:    ${params.BUILD_ARGS}"
                    echo "============================================"

                    if (!params.IMAGE_NAME?.trim()) {
                        error("IMAGE_NAME parameter cannot be empty")
                    }
                    if (!params.IMAGE_TAG?.trim()) {
                        error("IMAGE_TAG parameter cannot be empty")
                    }
                    if (!params.REGISTRY_URL?.trim()) {
                        error("REGISTRY_URL parameter cannot be empty")
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Checkout') {
            steps {
                checkout scm
            }
        }

        stage('Verify Dockerfile') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def dockerfilePath = "${params.DOCKERFILE_PATH}/${params.DOCKERFILE_NAME}"
                    if (!fileExists(dockerfilePath)) {
                        error("Dockerfile not found at path: ${dockerfilePath}")
                    }
                    echo "Dockerfile found at: ${dockerfilePath}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Build Docker Image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def buildCommand = "docker build"

                    if (!params.USE_BUILD_CACHE) {
                        buildCommand += " --no-cache"
                    }

                    buildCommand += " -f ${params.DOCKERFILE_PATH}/${params.DOCKERFILE_NAME}"
                    buildCommand += " -t ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"

                    if (params.BUILD_ARGS?.trim()) {
                        buildCommand += " ${params.BUILD_ARGS}"
                    }

                    buildCommand += " ${params.DOCKERFILE_PATH}"

                    echo "Executing: ${buildCommand}"
                    sh buildCommand
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Verify Built Image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "docker inspect ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"
                    sh "docker images ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Login to Registry') {
            when {
                expression { return params.PUSH_IMAGE }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    withCredentials([usernamePassword(
                        credentialsId: params.REGISTRY_CREDENTIALS_ID,
                        usernameVariable: 'REGISTRY_USER',
                        passwordVariable: 'REGISTRY_PASS'
                    )]) {
                        sh "echo \$REGISTRY_PASS | docker login ${params.REGISTRY_URL} -u \$REGISTRY_USER --password-stdin"
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Push Docker Image') {
            when {
                expression { return params.PUSH_IMAGE }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Pushing image: ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"
                    sh "docker push ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"
                    echo "Successfully pushed ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            script {
                echo "Cleaning up local Docker image: ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"
                sh "docker rmi ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME} || true"
                sh "docker logout ${params.REGISTRY_URL} || true"
            }
        }
        success {
            echo "Pipeline completed successfully!"
            echo "Image: ${env.FULL_IMAGE_NAME}"
            echo "Pushed to registry: ${params.PUSH_IMAGE}"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Pipeline failed! Please check the logs for details."
        }
    }
}
